was meant to be a blog that kind of brought a lot of metrics together, and we were linking to others as well, so it's pretty interesting and promising that this one ranks.

so, as mentioned, our initial focus for this has been, hey, awareness, drive.

So

So just something to think about.
As we're going through here.

there's going be a giant backlog for us as we head into the end of May, start of June.
So we'll start to apply a lot of work there.
being able to build out the kind of backlog of content for us to hopefully ship in early June and then helping us get the site to the place where it needs to be are huge.
deeply appreciative of your efforts on both areas.

Is there?

So.

Not at all.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, website updates, and performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Galileo relaunched their website, facing some challenges with redirects and missing elements](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Content performance is strong, with new highs in views and sessions; evaluation, metrics, and agent testing driving most LLM referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Galileo is shifting focus towards conversions across the blog funnel, with a new campaigns person joining June 2nd](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide video content suggestions based on successful SEO topics, aiming for more detailed, technical content](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)

## Topics

### Website Relaunch and Ongoing Fixes

  - [Galileo officially relaunched their website the previous night](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Facing issues with missing redirects and other elements (e.g., table of contents)](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Conor expressed frustration with the development process and timeline constraints](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [GrowthX team to help QA content, focusing on blogs they've created](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [New CMS features toggles for tracking QA progress (feature, link QA, image QA, SEO QA)](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

### Content Performance and SEO

  - [New highs achieved in views and sessions](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Slight drop in Google clicks (6-7) and impressions, offset by rise in Bing traffic](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic decreased slightly from overall high](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Top-performing content pillars: evaluation, metrics, and agent testing](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Standout blog: "Accuracy metrics to evaluate AI model performance"](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

### Content Strategy and Future Plans

  - [GrowthX continuing with podcast quote integration into top-performing blogs](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Shifting focus towards conversions across the entire blog funnel](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [New campaigns person joining Galileo on June 2nd to work on funnel enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Potential content rewrites planned for late June, pending persona and messaging updates](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Exploring opportunities for video content based on successful SEO topics](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)

### Technical Audit and Ongoing Tasks

  - [Mika created baseline technical audit, starting full audit tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide new topics for the finance vertical by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Continued work on content review post-migration, including image and CTA updates](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)

### Video Content Collaboration

  - [Galileo open to creating more detailed, technical video content](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [GrowthX to brainstorm video topics based on successful SEO content](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Suggestion: Deeper dives into Galileo's metrics and practical use cases, with demonstrations](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to create thread in Galileo channel for website feedback and issues](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [Continue with content audit and QA process](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [GrowthX to deliver new finance vertical topics by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [GrowthX to brainstorm and provide list of potential video content topics](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Galileo team to focus on clearing backlog of SEO review in early June](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [New campaigns person to be involved in calls and conversion strategy from June 2nd](https://fathom.video/share/yKx4ZxHsMdnpbCukdGsD777xaBsLUsZp?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)

action_items.description: Create thread in growthx channel to capture website issues/feedback
Flag URL slug issues needing redirects to Conor
Brainstorm video topic ideas + angles based on successful SEO content. Prep list for Conor
